$comment: Settings extracted 2026-07-09 from 13 real VHS tapes in public repos (see sources). autotape's profile defaults are derived from these measured values, not taste.

typingSpeedMs.outlier: 1000ms used only for single-key TUI emphasis (diffnav)

polishDetails.githubBlend: ggh: Margin 20 + MarginFill "#0d1117" (GitHub dark bg) + BorderRadius 10
polishDetails.hideSetup: glow advanced: Hide/Show around setup commands

bestPractices.note: GIFs loop — one interaction beats a 45s walkthrough (rekort.app/blog/gif-for-github-readme)
